---
title: "Legacy Pattern Coupling Methods - Preserved Code"
author: "tidyEOF Package"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: html
---

# Legacy Pattern Coupling Methods

This vignette preserves all the original pattern coupling functionality from tidyEOF before the refactoring to a CCA-centric architecture. All code examples here represent the original implementation and should continue to work for backward compatibility.

## Overview of Original Methods

The tidyEOF package originally supported four main pattern coupling methods:

1. **CCA (Canonical Correlation Analysis)** - Linear relationships via `predict_cca()`
2. **GAM (Generalized Additive Models)** - Nonlinear relationships via `predict_gam()`
3. **PCR (Principal Component Regression)** - Linear regression with model selection via `predict_pcr()`
4. **EOT (Empirical Orthogonal Teleconnections)** - Spatial correlation patterns via `predict_eot()`

## Original couple_patterns() Function

The original `couple_patterns()` function was GAM-based and provided a high-level interface:

```r
# Original GAM-based implementation
couple_patterns_legacy <- function(patterns.x, patterns.y) {
  data_in <- prep_data(patterns.x, patterns.y)
  model <- fit_model(data_in)

  data_out <- model %>%
    dplyr::select(PC, data) %>%
    unnest(cols = c(data)) %>%
    dplyr::select(PC, amplitude, year, pred, resid)

  coupled_patterns <- list(model = dplyr::select(model, -data),
                           data = data_out)
  class(coupled_patterns) <- 'coupled_patterns'
  return(coupled_patterns)
}

# Helper functions for GAM approach
prep_data <- function(patterns.x, patterns.y) {
  amps.x <- if('patterns' %in% class(patterns.x)) patterns.x$amplitudes else patterns.x
  amps.y <- if('patterns' %in% class(patterns.y)) patterns.y$amplitudes else patterns.y

  predictors <- amps.x
  predictands <- tidyr::pivot_longer(amps.y, -time, names_to = 'PC', values_to = 'amplitude')
  inner_join(predictands, predictors, by = 'time')
}

fit_model <- function(data_in) {
  gam_formula <- data_in %>%
    dplyr::select(-PC, -amplitude, -time) %>%
    names() %>%
    map( ~ paste0("s(", ., ", bs = 'cr', k = 3)")) %>%
    paste(collapse = ' + ') %>%
    paste('amplitude ~ ', .) %>%
    as.formula()

  model <- data_in %>%
    group_by(PC) %>%
    nest() %>%
    mutate(mod = map(data, ~ gam(gam_formula, data = ., method = 'REML', select = TRUE))) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(r2 = map_dbl(mod, ~ summary(.)$r.sq)) %>%
    mutate(
      data = map2(data, mod, add_predictions),
      data = map2(data, mod, add_residuals)
    )
}

fit_pcr <- function(data_in) {
  lm_formula <- data_in %>%
    dplyr::select(-PC, -amplitude, -time) %>%
    names() %>%
    paste(collapse = ' + ') %>%
    paste('amplitude ~ ', .) %>%
    as.formula

  data_in %>%
    group_by(PC) %>%
    nest() %>%
    mutate(mod = map(data, ~ eval(getCall(dredge(lm(lm_formula, data = ., na.action = "na.fail")), 1)))) %>%
    ungroup()
}
```

## Original Prediction Methods

### CCA Prediction

```r
# Original predict_cca implementation
predict_cca_legacy <- function(preds, obs, newdata, k) {
  obs_amps <- obs$amplitudes %>%
    select(-time) %>%
    as.matrix()
  preds_amps <- preds$amplitudes %>%
    select(-time) %>%
    as.matrix()

  new_times <- st_get_dimension_values(newdata, 'time')

  # train CCA on training data
  cca <- cancor(preds_amps, obs_amps, xcenter = FALSE, ycenter = FALSE)

  # get PCs from newdata
  project_patterns(preds, newdata) %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames('time') %>%
    # predict CCA on newdata
    as.matrix() %*%
    cca$xcoef[,1:k, drop = FALSE] %*%
    diag(cca$cor, nrow = k) %*%
    solve(cca$ycoef)[1:k,,drop = FALSE] %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(time = new_times, .before = 1) %>%
    reconstruct_field(obs, amplitudes = ., nonneg = "auto")
}

# Original project_patterns implementation
project_patterns_legacy <- function(patterns, newdata) {
  new_times <- st_get_dimension_values(newdata, 'time')

  if(patterns$weight) newdata <- newdata * area_weights(newdata)

  newdata %>%
    get_anomalies(patterns$climatology, scale = patterns$scaled, monthly = patterns$monthly) %>%
    units::drop_units() %>%
    split('time') %>%
    setNames(new_times) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(x,y)) %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    t() %>%
    predict(patterns$pca, .) %>%
    .[,1:patterns$k, drop = FALSE] %>%
    {if(is.matrix(patterns$rotation)) . %*% patterns$rotation else .} %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    setNames(names0(patterns$k, 'PC')) %>%
    mutate(time = new_times, .before = 1)
}
```

### GAM Prediction

```r
# Original predict_gam implementation
predict_gam_legacy <- function(preds, obs, newdata, k) {
  k_preds <- preds$amplitudes %>%
    select(-time) %>%
    ncol()

  new_times <-  st_get_dimension_values(newdata, 'time')

  mod <- prep_data(preds, obs) %>%
    fit_model()

  new_pcs <- newdata %>%
    {if(preds$weight) . * area_weights(.) else .} %>%
    get_anomalies(preds$climatology, scale = preds$scaled, monthly = preds$monthly) %>%
    units::drop_units() %>%
    split('time') %>%
    setNames(new_times) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(x,y)) %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    t() %>%
    predict(preds$pca, .) %>%
    .[,1:k_preds, drop = FALSE] %>%
    as_tibble(rownames = 'time')

  purrr::map(mod$mod, ~add_predictions(new_pcs, ., var = 'amplitude', type = 'response')) %>%
    bind_rows(.id = 'PC') %>%
    dplyr::select(time, PC, amplitude) %>%
    mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PC, names_prefix = 'PC', values_from = amplitude) %>%
    reconstruct_field(obs, ., nonneg = "auto")
}
```

### PCR Prediction

```r
# Original predict_pcr implementation
predict_pcr_legacy <- function(preds, obs, newdata, k) {
  k_preds <- preds$amplitudes %>%
    select(-time) %>%
    ncol()

  new_times <-  st_get_dimension_values(newdata, 'time')

  mod <- prep_data(preds, obs) %>%
    fit_pcr()

  new_pcs <- newdata %>%
    {if(preds$weight) . * area_weights(.) else .} %>%
    get_anomalies(preds$climatology, scale = preds$scaled, monthly = preds$monthly) %>%
    units::drop_units() %>%
    split('time') %>%
    setNames(new_times) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(x,y)) %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    t() %>%
    predict(preds$pca, .) %>%
    .[,1:k_preds, drop = FALSE] %>%
    as_tibble(rownames = 'time')

  purrr::map(mod$mod, ~add_predictions(new_pcs, ., var = 'amplitude', type = 'response')) %>%
    bind_rows(.id = 'PC') %>%
    dplyr::select(time, PC, amplitude) %>%
    mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PC, names_prefix = 'PC', values_from = amplitude) %>%
    reconstruct_field(obs, ., nonneg = "auto")
}
```

### EOT Prediction

```r
# Original predict_eot implementation
predict_eot_legacy <- function(cv, k) {
  pmap(list(cv$eot, cv$test, cv$mean), ~predict(..1, ..2, n = k) + ..3) %>%
    brick() %>%
    stars::st_as_stars() %>%
    stars::st_set_dimensions('band', names = 'time') %>%
    transmute(value = units::set_units(layer.1.1, mm))
}
```

## Cross-Validation Framework

### Original prep_cca function

```r
# Original cross-validation preparation
prep_cca_legacy <- function(preds, obs, k_preds, k_obs, kfolds = 5, scale = FALSE, rotate = FALSE, monthly = FALSE, weight = TRUE) {
  # find the years of overlap between the response and predictor fields
  time_steps <- intersect(st_get_dimension_values(preds, 'time'),
                          st_get_dimension_values(obs, 'time'))
  preds <- filter(preds, time %in% time_steps)
  obs <- filter(obs, time %in% time_steps)
  folds <- prep_folds(time_steps, kfolds = kfolds)

  # preprocess the training data for each fold
  train_obs <- purrr::map(folds, ~ filter(obs, !(time %in% .))  %>%
                            get_patterns(k = k_obs, scale = scale, rotate = rotate, monthly = monthly, weight = weight))

  train_preds <- purrr::map(folds, ~ filter(preds, !(time %in% .)) %>%
                              get_patterns(k = k_preds, scale = scale, rotate = rotate, monthly = monthly, weight = weight))

  # preprocess test data for each fold
  test <- purrr::map(folds, ~ filter(preds, time %in% .))

  tibble(train_obs, train_preds, test)
}

# Original fold preparation
prep_folds_legacy <- function(times, kfolds = 5){
  # divide years into kfolds contiguous folds
  n <- length(times)
  r <- n %% kfolds
  fold_times <- rep(n %/% kfolds, kfolds)
  if(r > 0) fold_times[1:r] <- fold_times[1:r] + 1
  tibble(time = times, fold = rep(1:kfolds, times = fold_times)) %>%
    group_nest(fold) %>%
    pull(data) %>%
    purrr::map(pull)
}

# Original cross-validation fitting
fit_cv_legacy <- function(dat, fun, k, obs) {
  recon <- pmap(list(dat$train_preds, dat$train_obs, dat$test), fun, k = k) %>%
    do.call('c', .)

  error <- dplyr::filter(recon, between(time, 1982, 2010)) - dplyr::filter(obs, between(time, 1982, 2010))

  rmse <- sqrt(mean(pull(error, 1) ^ 2, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% as.numeric()

  corr <- obs %>%
    filter(between(time, 1982, 2010)) %>%
    get_total_num() %>%
    cor(get_total_num(filter(recon, between(time, 1982, 2010))))

  c(rmse = rmse,
    corr = corr)
}
```

## Usage Examples from Original Vignettes

### Cross-Validation Comparison

```r
# Original cross-validation workflow comparing methods
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyEOF)

# Example data preparation (from supplement.Rmd)
cv_cca <- expand_grid(kx = 1:10, ky = 1:10, kxy = 1:10) %>%
  filter(kxy <= pmin(kx, ky)) %>%
  mutate(cv = pmap(list(kx, ky, kxy), ~prep_cca(..1, ..2,
                                                preds = cera,
                                                obs = prism) %>%
                     fit_cv(fun = predict_cca, k = ..3, prism))) %>%
  unnest_wider(cv)

cv_gam <- expand_grid(kx = 1:10, ky = 1:10) %>%
  mutate(cv = map2(kx, ky, ~prep_cca(.x, .y, preds = cera, obs = prism) %>%
                     fit_cv(fun = predict_gam, k = .y, obs = prism))) %>%
  unnest_wider(cv)

cv_pcr <- expand_grid(kx = 1:10, ky = 1:10) %>%
  mutate(cv = map2(kx, ky, ~prep_cca(.x, .y, preds = cera, obs = prism) %>%
                     fit_cv(fun = predict_pcr, k = .y, obs = prism))) %>%
  unnest_wider(cv)

# EOT cross-validation
cv_eot_data <- prep_eot(cera, prism, 10, 10, 10)
cv_eot <- tibble(k = 1:10) %>%
  mutate(pred = purrr::map(k, predict_eot, cv = cv_eot_data),
         error = purrr::map(pred, cv_eot_error, obs = prism)) %>%
  select(k, error) %>%
  unnest_wider(error)
```

### Method Performance Comparison

```r
# Performance comparison plotting
cv_comparison <- cv_cca %>%
  group_by(kxy) %>%
  filter(rmse == min(rmse)) %>%
  rename(k = kxy) %>%
  bind_rows(cv_eot, .id = 'Method') %>%
  mutate(Method = if_else(Method == '1', 'CCA', 'EOT'))

cv_comparison %>%
  ggplot(aes(k, rmse)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Method, color = Method), size = 1.2) +
  scale_color_grey() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10, minor_breaks = NULL) +
  labs(x = 'Coupled patterns', y = 'RMSE (mm)')
```

## Original Validation Functions

```r
# Original validation utilities
cv_eot_error <- function(recon, obs) {
  error <- recon - filter(obs, between(time, 1982, 2010))
  rmse <- sqrt(mean(pull(error, 1) ^ 2, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% as.numeric()
  corr <- obs %>%
    filter(between(time, 1982, 2010)) %>%
    get_total_num() %>%
    cor(get_total_num(recon))
  c(rmse = rmse, corr = corr)
}

get_total_num <- function(dat) {
  (dat * st_area(dat)) %>%
    st_apply(3, function(x) sum(x, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    pull() %>%
    as.numeric()
}

get_total <- function(dat) {
  (dat * st_area(dat)) %>%
    st_apply(3, function(x) sum(x, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(SWE = units::set_units(SWE, m^2*mm) %>%
             units::set_units(Tl))
}
```

## Notes

All functions in this vignette represent the original implementation before refactoring. These should be maintained for backward compatibility and serve as reference for the original methodology. The new refactored implementation focuses on CCA as the primary method while maintaining the same core functionality.
